fields.title: Migrate Ralph onto the shared loop engine without changing /ralph UX
fields.description:
Port Ralph from the current .pi/ralph-specific architecture onto the shared loop engine and .pi/loops storage model.

Keep the user-facing /ralph command surface, fresh child-session behavior, checklist pacing, reflection cadence, and explicit completion handshake semantics. Move Ralph task documents to .pi/loops/tasks/** and Ralph state to the new shared persisted union instead of separate Ralph-only runtime files.

This task should preserve Ralph as the generic multi-iteration workflow specialization while deleting Ralph-specific runtime storage and controller logic that the shared engine now owns.
